interfaces.name: getHomeNavigationSections
interfaces.description: Get main navigation sections for the homepage, including directory categories and key sections like events, volunteering, groups, and saved lists.

id.description: Internal identifier for the nav item, e.g., 'restaurants_food', 'events', 'volunteering', 'parks_outdoors', 'home_services', 'childcare', 'groups_clubs', 'saved_lists'

page_key.description: Page type this nav item goes to, e.g., 'directory_list', 'events_list', 'groups_list', 'saved_lists_overview'

category_id.description: Optional DirectoryCategory.id when this nav item corresponds to a directory category, e.g., 'restaurants_food'

interfaces.name: homeQuickSearch
interfaces.description: Perform a simple keyword and ZIP-based search across places, events, volunteering opportunities, and groups from the homepage.

parameters.name: content_types
parameters.description: Optional filter for which content types to search.

interfaces.name: getHomeFeaturedContent
interfaces.description: Get featured restaurants, events, services, and parks for the homepage.

interfaces.name: getDirectoryCategories
interfaces.description: Get all top-level directory categories (restaurants, parks, home services, childcare) for navigation and directory listing headers.

interfaces.name: getDirectoryFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for a given directory category (restaurants, parks, home services, childcare).

applies_to.description: What price field this applies to, e.g., 'average_price_per_person', 'hourly_rate', 'call_out_fee'

supports_date_time.description: True if category supports date/time availability filters.

interfaces.name: searchDirectoryPlaces
interfaces.description: Search local places/providers within a directory category with filters for location, price, rating, amenities, schedule, and sorting.

max_average_price_per_person.description: Max spend per person for restaurants.

max_hourly_rate.description: Max hourly rate for childcare or similar services.

max_call_out_fee.description: Max call-out fee for trades like plumbers.

parameters.name: availability
parameters.description: Filter by specific date/time or recurring weekly availability.

date.description: Specific date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format, e.g., next upcoming friday.

summary.description: Short description snippet for the listing card.

interfaces.name: getPlaceDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a place/provider including pricing, amenities, and operating hours, plus whether it is saved to any lists.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for events and volunteering listings.

interfaces.name: searchEvents
interfaces.description: Search local events or volunteering opportunities with filters for location, date, time, price, cause, and spots available.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Single event date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format, e.g., next upcoming saturday.

parameters.name: is_free_only
parameters.description: Set true to show only free events.

parameters.name: cause
parameters.description: For volunteering listings, filter by cause, e.g., 'environment', 'community'.

parameters.name: min_spots_remaining
parameters.description: Minimum number of available spots, e.g., 10 for '10+ spots left'.

interfaces.name: getEventDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for an event or volunteering opportunity, including pricing, cause, spots remaining, associated group, and current RSVP/save state.

rsvp_status.description: Current RSVP status for this single user, e.g., 'going', 'interested', 'not_going', 'not_responded'

interfaces.name: rsvpToEvent
interfaces.description: Create or update the RSVP for the single user for a specific event or group session.

interfaces.name: sendOrganizerMessage
interfaces.description: Send a message to the organizer of an event or volunteering opportunity using the internal contact form.

interfaces.name: getGroupFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the groups & clubs listings page.

interfaces.name: searchGroups
interfaces.description: Search local groups & clubs by keyword, location, experience level, and meeting pattern.

interfaces.name: getGroupDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a group including description, meeting pattern, location, membership status, and upcoming sessions.

rsvp_status.description: Single-user RSVP status for this event, if any.

interfaces.name: joinGroup
interfaces.description: Join a group using the site's single-user membership system.

interfaces.name: addItemToSavedList
interfaces.description: Add a place, event, or group to an existing saved list for the single user.

parameters.name: item_type
parameters.description: Type of item being saved: 'place', 'event', or 'group'

interfaces.name: createSavedListAndAddItem
interfaces.description: Create a new saved list and add a place, event, or group to it in a single operation.

parameters.name: item_type
parameters.description: Type of item being saved: 'place', 'event', or 'group'

interfaces.name: getSavedListsOverview
interfaces.description: Get an overview of all saved lists created by the single user, including counts of items.

interfaces.name: createSavedList
interfaces.description: Create a new empty saved list with a custom name.

interfaces.name: renameSavedList
interfaces.description: Rename an existing saved list.

interfaces.name: deleteSavedList
interfaces.description: Delete an existing saved list and all its items for the single user.

interfaces.name: getSavedListDetail
interfaces.description: Get the details of a specific saved list, including all items and resolved display information for each item.

interfaces.name: removeItemFromSavedList
interfaces.description: Remove a single item from a saved list.

interfaces.name: reorderSavedListItems
interfaces.description: Update the ordering of items in a saved list based on a new ordered list of list item IDs.

interfaces.name: clearSavedList
interfaces.description: Remove all items from a saved list while keeping the list itself.

interfaces.name: getStaticPageContent
interfaces.description: Get static informational content for pages like About, Help, Terms & Conditions, and Privacy Policy.

parameters.name: page_key
parameters.description: Identifier of the static page, e.g., 'about', 'help', 'terms', 'privacy'

body_markdown.description: Page content as markdown or rich text.

interfaces.name: getSiteContactInfo
interfaces.description: Get site-level contact information for display on the Contact page.

interfaces.name: submitSiteContactMessage
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact message to the site owner/administrator from the Contact page.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateSavedListByName
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find an existing SavedList by name for the single user or create it if it does not exist.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateDistanceMilesFromZip
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to calculate distance in miles between a stored latitude/longitude and a given ZIP code for search result display.

helperFunctions.name: _applyPlaceAvailabilityFilter
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to filter places based on PlaceOperatingHour records and requested availability (date, time, days_of_week).

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateSingleUserState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to initialize and retrieve the single-user state context (saved lists, memberships, RSVPs) from storage.
